snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi(
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
)
client.user.get(
    id="id",
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    token="YOUR_TOKEN",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.user.get(
        id="id",
    )


asyncio.run(main())
